prestazioni: Mercedes-Benz FO110M 3.0L V10 (engine code: FO110M) with a bespoke McLaren-developed dry-sump lubrication system, upgraded to 10,500 RPM redline via a custom billet crankshaft from Pankl Racing Systems and titanium connecting rods from Carrillo, paired with a Garrett GT35R turbocharger (single-turbo conversion) running 2.2 bar of boost with a custom intercooler core from Setrab

McLaren-designed 7-speed semi-automatic transmission (sequential, paddle-shift) reinforced with a Quaife ATB differential and upgraded carbon-fiber clutch plates from Sachs Performance, mated to a lightweight flywheel from Tilton Engineering

Ohlins TTX40 4-way adjustable coilovers with McLaren-specific valving, paired with Eibach ERS springs (20% stiffer than OEM) and spherical bearing top mounts from SuperPro, alongside AP Racing 6-piston calipers with carbon-ceramic rotors (380mm front, 355mm rear) and Ferodo DS3000 brake pads
estetica: Full carbon-fiber bodywork replacement using McLaren F1-style pre-preg autoclave panels from Callaway Carbon, including a custom front splitter with integrated Gurney flap and a rear diffuser from APR Performance (MP4-14-specific mold)

Custom 18-inch OZ Racing Superleggera wheels (front: 12x18, rear: 14.5x18) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (265/645R18 front, 325/705R18 rear), wrapped in a matte silver finish with gold accents matching the McLaren F1 GTR livery

Interior overhaul featuring a full carbon-fiber monocoque tub reinforcement from Capristo, Recaro Pole Position seats with 6-point harnesses from Schroth Racing, and a custom digital dash from Motec (C127 display) with integrated telemetry logging for lap-time analysis
